hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.go$' && gofmt -w "$f" 2>/dev/null; } || true

cd /Users/felixgeelhaar/Developer/projects/open_source/browse-go && bash scripts/pre-commit.sh 2>&1 | tail -20; exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; if [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Pre-commit checks failed. Fix the issues before stopping."}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running pre-commit checks (gofmt, vet, lint, tests, coverctl, nox)...
